module.name: max-params
module.description: Enforce a maximum number of function parameters.

scenarios.name: should allow a function with fewer parameters than the configured maximum
scenarios.given: a function declaration with two parameters and a max of four

scenarios.name: should allow a function with exactly the allowed maximum number of parameters
scenarios.given: a function with exactly max parameters

scenarios.name: should allow a function with no parameters
should report when a function has more parameters than the configured maximum
scenarios.given: a function with more parameters than the configured max
scenarios.then: a maxParams violation is reported on the function node

scenarios.name: should report for arrow functions exceeding the parameter limit
scenarios.given: an arrow function with excess parameters
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the arrow function
